name: Barilliance
body: [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://www.neto.com.au/assets/thumb/APP-55.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://www.neto.com.au/assets/thumb/APP-55.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Barilliance."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://www.barilliance.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-On Website"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.barilliance.com/best-ecommerce-personalization-solution/", "children": [{"text": "contact Barilliance"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Barilliance"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create an account on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://www.barilliance.com/", "children": [{"text": "Barilliance"}]}, {"text": " and copy the code provided to you."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the Barilliance add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Paste the code you copied from Barilliance into the pop-up window, and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}]
